name: pr-watch
description: >- Local PR watcher. Monitors CI status, automatically fixes failing checks by reading failure logs and applying targeted fixes, then optionally merges when all checks pass. Local CLI analog to Claude Code's cloud auto-fix feature.
author: SethGammon
summary_zh: 这是一个本地命令行工具，能帮你盯着 PR 的 CI 状态，遇到报错就读日志自动修复，全部通过后还能自动合并，适合想省去手动排查 CI 失败麻烦的开发者。
